A

addObserver(User) - Method in class models.Clothing
Adds a user as an observer to this product.
addObserver(User) - Method in class models.Electronics
Adds a user as an observer to this product.
addObserver(User) - Method in class models.Grocery
Adds a user as an observer to this product.
addObserver(User) - Method in class models.Product
Adds a user as an observer to the product.
addReview(ProductReview) - Method in class models.Product
Adds a review to the product.
applyDiscount(double) - Method in class models.Product
Applies a discount to the product.

C

Clothing - Class in models
The Clothing class represents a product in the "Clothing" category.
Clothing(String, double) - Constructor for class models.Clothing
Initializes a new Clothing product with the specified name and price.

D

displayInfo() - Method in class models.Product
Displays the product details, including its category, original price, and discounted price (if applicable).
displayReviews() - Method in class models.Product
Displays all reviews for the product.

E

Electronics - Class in models
The Electronics class represents a product in the "Electronics" category.
Electronics(String, double) - Constructor for class models.Electronics
Initializes a new Electronics product with the specified name and price.

G

getDiscountedPrice() - Method in class models.Product
Retrieves the discounted price of the product.
getName() - Method in class models.Product
Retrieves the name of the product.
getPrice() - Method in class models.Product
Retrieves the price of the product.
getProductCategory() - Method in class models.Clothing
Returns the category of this product.
getProductCategory() - Method in class models.Electronics
Returns the category of this product.
getProductCategory() - Method in class models.Grocery
Returns the category of this product.
getProductCategory() - Method in class models.Product
Retrieves the category of the product.
getRating() - Method in class models.ProductReview
Retrieves the rating for this review.
getReviewText() - Method in class models.ProductReview
Retrieves the review text for this review.
Grocery - Class in models
The Grocery class represents a product in the "Grocery" category.
Grocery(String, double) - Constructor for class models.Grocery
Initializes a new Grocery product with the specified name and price.

M

models - package models
The models package contains the core classes used to represent products, reviews, and other entities within the online store.

N

notifyObservers(String) - Method in class models.Clothing
Notifies all subscribed observers about a change in the product's status.
notifyObservers(String) - Method in class models.Electronics
Notifies all subscribed observers about a change in the product's status.
notifyObservers(String) - Method in class models.Grocery
Notifies all subscribed observers about a change in the product's status.
notifyObservers(String) - Method in class models.Product
Notifies all subscribed observers about an update.

P

Product - Class in models
The Product class represents a generic product in the system.
Product(String, double) - Constructor for class models.Product
Initializes a new product with the specified name and price.
ProductReview - Class in models
The ProductReview class represents a review for a product.
ProductReview(String, String, int) - Constructor for class models.ProductReview
Initializes a new product review with the specified reviewer name, review text, and rating.

T

toString() - Method in class models.ProductReview
Returns a string representation of the product review.
